title: COOKIE Character Identity
description: Schema for character identity files used by the COOKIE framework. Validated by the validate-character task (T7).

character_id.description: Unique identifier matching the character directory name

role.description: Character's role in the video (e.g., Hotel General Manager)

type.description: Whether the character has visual, voice, or both representations

physical.description: Physical appearance details for visual characters

age_range.description: Apparent age range (e.g., late 40s to mid 50s)

distinguishing_features.description: Notable visual features (glasses, scars, tattoos, etc.)

prompt_tokens.description: Text tokens injected into generation prompts

core_identity.description: Always injected into prompts when this character appears. Must be a complete visual description.

negative.description: What the character should NOT look like. Added to negative prompts.

veo_specific.description: Additional tokens optimized for VEO video generation prompts

nano_banana_specific.description: Additional tokens optimized for Nano Banana image generation prompts

voice.description: ElevenLabs voice configuration. Required if type is visual-voice or voice-only.

speaking_style.description: Description of how the character speaks

active_style.description: Currently active visual style (e.g., realistic, animated)

active_outfit.description: Currently active outfit within the active style

available_outfits.description: Map of style name to list of available outfits
